agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Mandibular incisors typically have single roots and canals, with no documented cases showing frequent occurrence of multiple canals. Evidence indicates such occurrences are extremely rare, well below any reported rates above 3%.  
\boxed{D}

The correct answer is D due to strong anatomical support indicating that mandibular incisors usually have one root and canal system, making dual-canality exceptionally infrequent.  

\boxed{D}. Answer choice: D
